TopNav.title: StockAI Hub
TopNav.searchLoadFailed: Could not load instruments. Check that the API is running.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: Overview of your portfolio, market data, and automated analysis.
Dashboard.ingestionEmpty: No bars returned for the selected date range.
Dashboard.homeOverviewDesc: Core market pulse, macro watchpoints, sector rotation, news sentiment, and key operating status.
Dashboard.terminalHotSectorsDesc: Ranked sector movement and fund-flow heat.
Dashboard.terminalLatestNewsDesc: Stored local news rows with sentiment confidence.
Dashboard.terminalLatestNewsUnavailable: Latest stored news could not be loaded.
Dashboard.terminalMarketOverviewDesc: Compact benchmark line view from homepage indices.
Dashboard.terminalFundFlowDesc: Sector net-flow bars from the current hot-sector payload.
Dashboard.terminalAiSentimentDesc: Dashboard-derived sentiment status from local signals.
Dashboard.aiSentimentResearchOnly: Research-only status. No trading instruction, target price, position sizing, or execution guidance.
Dashboard.homeCoreIndicesDesc: US and A-share benchmark indices stay at the top of the homepage.
Dashboard.homeIndexPayloadMissing: {code} is configured for the homepage, but it is not present in the current market overview payload.
Dashboard.importantSignalsDesc: Compact status only; detailed workflows live in their own modules.
Dashboard.marketDashboardDesc: Core indices, followed K-line charts, and valuation indicators are shown before operational diagnostics.
Dashboard.marketDashboardUnavailableDesc: Could not load the aggregated market overview. Check the API service and provider settings.
Dashboard.workspaceSubtitle: Chart-first overview for {symbol}, with watchlist movement, core indices, and research actions in one scan.
Dashboard.workspaceNoWatchlistItems: No followed instruments are available yet.
Dashboard.coreIndicesDesc: CN/HK/US index cards based on the latest available daily bars.
Dashboard.hotSectorsUnavailable: Hot sectors are unavailable. Check the API service or data provider.
Dashboard.hotSectorsDataCaution: This sector data is not complete verified realtime fund-flow data. Use it with the provider, timestamp, and definition shown here.
Dashboard.followedKlineDesc: Up to six followed instruments with compact candlesticks, MA20, volume, and links to detailed charts.
Dashboard.chartUnavailable: No daily bars available for this chart.
Dashboard.dashboardBriefDesc: Deterministic daily brief from macro indicators, watchlist freshness, reports, and data gaps. It is not investment advice.
Dashboard.openAiResearchHint: Use the AI Research Desk to combine selected stocks, macro context, technical signals, source gaps, and follow-up questions. Research assistance only.
Dashboard.favoriteMacroDesc: Your homepage watchlist for Buffett Indicator, rates, inflation, and liquidity context.
Dashboard.favoriteMacroPayloadMissing: Not present in the current market overview payload.
Dashboard.favoriteMacroGuidanceFredConfigure: Configure FRED_API_KEY, then run a FRED dry-run from Macro Research.
Dashboard.favoriteMacroGuidanceFredRefresh: Open Macro Research and run the FRED dry-run/write refresh to store audited observations.
Dashboard.favoriteMacroGuidanceWorldBankRefresh: Open Macro Research and run the World Bank refresh; values are annual and lagged.
Dashboard.favoriteMacroGuidanceManualChina: Use Macro Research for reviewed manual seed or a future China macro adapter; do not fabricate monthly values.
Dashboard.favoriteMacroGuidanceMacroResearch: Open Macro Research to review source readiness and collection options.
Dashboard.sourceReadinessDesc: Source coverage for macro indicators, hard-to-find research inputs, reports, and news that AI can summarize safely.
Dashboard.sourceReadinessNoAiUsage: AI usage is not configured yet.
Dashboard.sourceReadinessNoFreshnessPolicy: Freshness policy is not configured yet.
Dashboard.valuationIndicatorsDesc: Buffett Indicator, rates, inflation, and liquidity watchpoints with auditable source and as-of metadata.
Dashboard.indicatorNoData: No audited observation has been seeded yet.
Dashboard.dataHealthDesc: See what daily-bar data is available, how fresh it is, and the next action to take.
Dashboard.missingDataActionHint: Some checked symbols have missing or unavailable latest daily bars. Start ingestion first, then review diagnostics if it fails.
Dashboard.staleDataActionHint: Some checked symbols have stale daily bars. Refresh data before relying on analysis or reports.
Dashboard.healthyDataActionHint: Checked daily-bar data is available. Continue with {symbol} detail or analysis.
Dashboard.watchlistHealthDesc: Watchlist symbols with stale, missing, or unavailable latest daily bars.
Dashboard.defaultSampleHealthDesc: Default-sample symbols with stale, missing, or unavailable latest daily bars.
Dashboard.allCheckedDataFresh: All checked symbols have fresh latest daily bars.
Dashboard.primaryInstrumentStoryDesc: Latest daily-bar move, source, freshness, and follow-up links.
Dashboard.dailyMovementUnavailable: Need at least two daily bars to calculate movement.
Dashboard.aiReportDesc: Generated based on latest market data, news, and fundamentals.
Dashboard.smartRecommendationsDesc: Technical signal candidates from available data: {count}
Dashboard.smartRecommendationsEmpty: No research candidates yet. Keep monitoring the available data.
Dashboard.smartRecommendationsSafety: These are unbacktested technical signals from available data. Realtime status depends on the upstream provider, and historical evaluation requires sample size, window returns, and diagnostics. This is not investment advice.
Dashboard.noInstrumentsHint: Configure instruments in the backend or run market data ingestion.

MacroDashboard.title: Macroeconomic dashboard
MacroDashboard.description: Stored, source-traceable macro trends for a quick personal research scan.
MacroDashboard.refreshDegraded: Stored {count} observations; some source families were unavailable.
MacroDashboard.refreshFailed: Macro refresh failed. Existing stored observations were preserved.
MacroDashboard.loadFailedDescription: Stored macro observations could not be loaded. Maintenance tools remain available below.

EconomicCalendar.title: Economic release calendar
EconomicCalendar.description: Stored Eastmoney public releases for the current month. Values are never inferred when the source is missing.
EconomicCalendar.refreshFailed: Calendar refresh failed. Existing stored events were preserved.
EconomicCalendar.empty: No stored economic releases match this scope.
EconomicCalendar.loadFailedDescription: Stored calendar events could not be loaded. No upstream request was made by this page.

InvestmentCalendar.title: Investment Calendar
InvestmentCalendar.description: Scan stored economic releases and official company disclosures by month, then inspect the evidence scheduled for each day.
InvestmentCalendar.metricEventsDescription: Stored events matching the current filter.
InvestmentCalendar.metricActiveDaysDescription: Calendar days with at least one stored event.
InvestmentCalendar.metricHighestImportanceDescription: Economic source rating; company disclosures are not rated.
InvestmentCalendar.emptyMonth: No stored events match this month and filter.
InvestmentCalendar.emptyDay: No stored events are scheduled for this day.
InvestmentCalendar.loadFailedDescription: Stored calendar evidence could not be loaded. This page did not request an external provider.
InvestmentCalendar.truncated: This month exceeded the bounded display limit. Narrow the importance filter before relying on daily counts.

TopicResearch.title: Topic Research
TopicResearch.description: Scan stored news, industry history, and related companies across four focused personal-research topics.
TopicResearch.loadFailedDescription: The database projection could not be loaded. No provider or crawler was contacted.
TopicResearch.newsEmptyDescription: No stored news matched this topic and evidence window.
TopicResearch.rankingEmptyDescription: No stored industry-ranking history matched this topic and evidence window.
TopicResearch.companiesEmptyDescription: No stored company metadata matched this topic taxonomy.

MarketResearch.title: Market Research
MarketResearch.description: Event timing and stored industry performance for personal market review, kept separate from macroeconomic evidence.
MarketResearch.calendarMetricDescription: Stored events in the current Shanghai month.
MarketResearch.rankingMetricDescription: Stored industry trading dates available for comparison.

MarketMovers.title: Market Movers
MarketMovers.description: Latest stored A-share gainers and losers, compared on two exact market dates without requesting a live provider.
MarketMovers.noComparisonDate: A second stored market date is required.
MarketMovers.comparableDescription: Exact-date rows in the selected data cohort.
MarketMovers.noProvenance: No coherent provider cohort is available.
MarketMovers.tableDescription: Read-only PostgreSQL evidence. Changing a filter performs another bounded GET only.
MarketMovers.emptyDescription: The selected direction or exchange has no valid exact-date comparison in the current stored cohort.
MarketMovers.loadFailedDescription: The stored daily-bar ranking could not be read. No provider request or data change was attempted.

StorageOverview.title: Data Storage
StorageOverview.description: Read-only inventory of the research data stored in the local database, grouped by how it is used in this workspace.
StorageOverview.metricTablesDescription: Stored tables visible to this application.
StorageOverview.metricRecordsDescription: {kind}; normal reads never scan every production table.
StorageOverview.domainsDescription: Compact inventory grouped by research purpose. Unknown future tables remain visible under Other.
StorageOverview.inventoryDescription: Collected {collectedAt}. Counts are read-only database statistics.
StorageOverview.emptyTitle: The database has no application tables yet.
StorageOverview.emptyDescription: Tables will appear here after the database schema is initialized.
StorageOverview.loadFailedDescription: The database statistics could not be read. No stored data was changed.

CrawlerMonitor.title: Crawler Monitor
CrawlerMonitor.description: Read-only execution health for the collection pipelines that supply personal market research.
CrawlerMonitor.detailsDescription: Stored TaskRun evidence only. Opening or refreshing this page never starts, retries, or expires a crawler.
CrawlerMonitor.scope_fund_index_cn: ETF and index catalogs and daily bars
CrawlerMonitor.loadFailedDescription: Stored execution records could not be read. No crawler was started and no task state was changed.

EvidenceCenter.title: Macro Research
EvidenceCenter.description: Personal macro and valuation workspace for online/API-backed evidence, source gaps, and AI summaries.
EvidenceCenter.loadFailedDescription: Could not load the market overview research payload. Check the API service and provider settings.
EvidenceCenter.partialLoadDescription: The market overview could not be loaded. Independently available notes, briefs, and stored evidence remain visible below.
EvidenceCenter.metricIndicatorsDesc: Macro and valuation codes in the dashboard payload.
EvidenceCenter.metricCitableDesc: Stored local observations with value, as-of date, and source.
EvidenceCenter.metricMissingDesc: Indicators still waiting for reviewed observations.
EvidenceCenter.metricSourcesNeedActionDesc: Adapters, manual seeds, or local evidence still missing.
EvidenceCenter.officialRefreshDescription: Browser-controlled FRED and World Bank refresh paths for homepage macro favorites. Dry-run checks validate source coverage; explicit write refresh stores audited local observations.
EvidenceCenter.officialRefreshFredDescription: Rates, yield spread, CPI YoY, and M2 YoY require FRED_API_KEY and write audited local observations after validation.
EvidenceCenter.officialRefreshWorldBankDescription: US, mainland China, and Hong Kong Buffett Indicator readings use annual public World Bank data and do not require a secret.
EvidenceCenter.officialSourceFredFreshnessPolicy: Daily Treasury rates/spreads; monthly CPI and M2 release cadence.
EvidenceCenter.officialSourceWorldBankFreshnessPolicy: Annual lagged World Bank context; never fabricate current-year values.
EvidenceCenter.officialSourceFredConfigure: Set FRED_API_KEY, then run a dry-run before writing observations.
EvidenceCenter.officialSourceFredRunRefresh: Run FRED dry-run, then write refresh to store validated local observations.
EvidenceCenter.officialSourceFredUpToDate: Covered FRED indicators already have local observations; refresh after new source releases.
EvidenceCenter.officialSourceWorldBankRunRefresh: Run World Bank dry-run, then write refresh for missing Buffett Indicator regions.
EvidenceCenter.officialSourceWorldBankUpToDate: Covered Buffett Indicator regions already have local observations.
EvidenceCenter.officialSourceCitationPolicy: Status rows, links, and diagnostics are guidance only; AI may cite macro values only after local observations are stored.
EvidenceCenter.officialSourceStatusUnavailable: Official source status could not be loaded; use the runbook and refresh controls below.
EvidenceCenter.officialRefreshWriteStoresObservation: Write refresh stores audited local observations for AI summaries; dry-run validates only and writes nothing.
EvidenceCenter.officialRefreshFailed: Refresh failed. Check provider configuration and API service status.
EvidenceCenter.officialRefreshCitationBoundary: AI summaries may cite only stored local observations, generated reports, stored news, or reviewed/citable source notes.
EvidenceCenter.officialRefreshUnsupportedGap: China monthly values such as cn_m2_yoy remain source gaps until a reviewed seed or future adapter stores observations.
EvidenceCenter.advancedToolsDescription: Optional fallback workflows for manual seed imports, rare source notes, and research prompts when online/API data is not enough.
EvidenceCenter.followUpDescription: Deterministic research prompts, source-review tasks, seed-prep actions, and source gaps derived from local evidence.
EvidenceCenter.followUpTotalDesc: Visible research actions from current local context.
EvidenceCenter.followUpAiQuestionsDesc: Notebook follow-up prompts waiting for future summaries.
EvidenceCenter.followUpSeedPrepDesc: Manual macro or valuation evidence preparation tasks.
EvidenceCenter.followUpSourceGapsDesc: Sources still missing adapters, seeds, or local evidence.
EvidenceCenter.followUpNoItemsDesc: Add reviewed source notes, AI follow-up prompts, or macro source targets to populate this queue.
EvidenceCenter.followUpSafetyDescription: Queue items are research prompts and evidence-preparation tasks only, not buy/sell/hold, target-price, position-sizing, or execution instructions.
EvidenceCenter.briefDescription: Summary, citations, diagnostics, and source gaps from stored evidence only.
EvidenceCenter.briefNarrativeUnavailableDesc: Dashboard sections and diagnostics are still shown when present.
EvidenceCenter.briefEvidenceDescription: Allowed citations and safety flags from the current dashboard brief.
EvidenceCenter.noCitations: No stored evidence citations are available yet.
EvidenceCenter.indicatorTableDescription: All configured Buffett Indicator, rates, inflation, and liquidity observations with source and audit metadata.
EvidenceCenter.noIndicatorsDesc: Check the dashboard service payload before relying on the evidence center.
EvidenceCenter.indicatorNoData: No audited observation has been seeded yet.
EvidenceCenter.sourceReadinessDescription: Source status, collection links, seed templates, freshness policies, and citation boundaries.
EvidenceCenter.sourceTotalDesc: Registry entries in the readiness payload.
EvidenceCenter.sourceConfiguredDesc: Sources with local evidence already stored.
EvidenceCenter.sourceNeedsActionDesc: Sources needing adapters, seeds, or local data.
EvidenceCenter.sourceFutureDesc: Planned sources that are not citeable today.
EvidenceCenter.noSourcesDesc: The evidence center can still show stored indicators when source readiness is absent.
EvidenceCenter.sourceNoAiUsage: AI usage is not configured yet.
EvidenceCenter.sourceNoFreshnessPolicy: Freshness policy is not configured yet.
EvidenceCenter.citationBoundaryDescription: The page separates local evidence from collection guidance so AI summaries do not overclaim.
EvidenceCenter.citationBoundaryLocalEvidence: AI may cite stored macro observations, generated reports, and stored news with local metadata.
EvidenceCenter.citationBoundaryGuidanceOnly: Collection links and seed templates stay collection guidance until reviewed observations are imported.
EvidenceCenter.citationBoundaryNoTradingAdvice: Summaries stay research-oriented and must not produce buy, sell, hold, target-price, sizing, or execution instructions.

MarketDailyEvidence.title: Stored market daily evidence
MarketDailyEvidence.description: Persist provider-normalized fund flow, limit-up, Dragon Tiger List, block-trade, and hot-sector rows before AI citation.
MarketDailyEvidence.emptyDescription: Run refresh to import provider-verified rows. Live provider responses remain non-citable until stored.
MarketDailyEvidence.loadFailedDescription: Could not load stored market daily evidence. Check the API and database migration state.

OfficialDisclosureEvidence.title: Official disclosure document evidence
OfficialDisclosureEvidence.description: Track CNINFO metadata and extracted PDF sections for A-share instruments in the active watchlist.
OfficialDisclosureEvidence.monitoringDescription: Scheduled CNINFO refresh uses durable cursors, a bounded overlap window, and per-symbol retry backoff. New rows require human review.
OfficialDisclosureEvidence.emptyDescription: Add an A-share instrument to the watchlist, then run the bounded metadata and PDF batch.
OfficialDisclosureEvidence.loadFailedDescription: Could not load watchlist disclosure coverage. Existing evidence remains stored.
OfficialDisclosureEvidence.metadataBoundary: Metadata citations do not prove document content
OfficialDisclosureEvidence.contentBoundary: Only persisted extracted sections are content evidence

ResearchBriefInbox.title: Saved research brief inbox
ResearchBriefInbox.description: Generate and keep reusable AI summaries from the current Evidence Center context, citations, source gaps, and follow-up questions.
ResearchBriefInbox.generateFailed: Could not generate the research brief.
ResearchBriefInbox.loadFailedDescription: Could not load saved research briefs. Existing evidence sections are still available.
ResearchBriefInbox.emptyDescription: Generate a brief after reviewing Source Notebook entries, macro evidence, and follow-up prompts.

EvidenceSeedImport.title: Import reviewed seed evidence
EvidenceSeedImport.description: Paste or select a local JSON/CSV seed file, preview validation, then confirm import into local AI-citable evidence.
EvidenceSeedImport.pastePlaceholder: JSON or CSV with observations: code, as_of, value, source, components.source_series_id, components.methodology
EvidenceSeedImport.contentRequired: Paste seed content or select a JSON/CSV file first.
EvidenceSeedImport.fileReadFailed: Could not read the selected file.
EvidenceSeedImport.previewFailed: Preview failed. Check the API service and seed content.
EvidenceSeedImport.importFailed: Import failed. No observations were written.
EvidenceSeedImport.invalidNoImport: Preview found validation errors. No observations were imported.
EvidenceSeedImport.overwriteWarning: Preview found existing observations. Confirm overwrite before importing.
EvidenceSeedImport.overwriteCheckbox: I reviewed the update rows and confirm overwriting existing observations for the same indicator/date.
EvidenceSeedImport.citationBoundary: Rows become AI-citable only after a successful confirmed import; source links and templates remain collection guidance.

ResearchSourceNotebook.title: Source notebook
ResearchSourceNotebook.description: Collect reviewed links, excerpts, uploaded browser text, calculation notes, and AI follow-up prompts for hard-to-find research inputs.
ResearchSourceNotebook.ingestionDescription: Use AI extraction to turn pasted or browser-uploaded text into an editable source summary, indicator hints, citation clues, and follow-up research questions.
ResearchSourceNotebook.acceptedFormats: Accepted browser files: .txt, .md, .csv, .json. PDF/OCR and raw document storage are not part of this MVP.
ResearchSourceNotebook.extractionContentRequired: Paste or upload source text before extraction.
ResearchSourceNotebook.extractionBoundary: Extraction suggestions are collection notes only. Saving as AI-citable evidence still requires reviewed status and explicit citation permission.
ResearchSourceNotebook.fileReadFailed: Could not read the selected file.
ResearchSourceNotebook.sourceNamePlaceholder: FRED, World Bank, SEC, manual review
ResearchSourceNotebook.excerptPlaceholder: Paste or upload the source excerpt you reviewed.
ResearchSourceNotebook.notePlaceholder: Record method, assumptions, and why this source matters.
ResearchSourceNotebook.methodologyNotePlaceholder: Record the calculation method, series transform, or review procedure.
ResearchSourceNotebook.licenseNotePlaceholder: Record public-domain, official-source, fair-use, or personal-use limits.
ResearchSourceNotebook.aiFollowUpPlaceholder: Question or synthesis prompt to revisit later.
ResearchSourceNotebook.saveFailed: Source note could not be saved.
ResearchSourceNotebook.contentRequired: Title, source name, source type, and either URL or excerpt are required.
ResearchSourceNotebook.citableBoundary: Draft notes and raw uploads stay collection notes. AI citations require reviewed status, explicit citation permission, and a source excerpt.
ResearchSourceNotebook.loadFailed: Source notebook entries could not be loaded.
ResearchSourceNotebook.noNotes: No source notes match the current filters.

AdvancedCandlestickChart.workspaceDescription: Save the current range, indicator toggles, and research note locally.
AdvancedCandlestickChart.workspaceSaved: Chart workspace saved in this browser.
AdvancedCandlestickChart.workspaceNotFound: No saved local chart workspace was found.
AdvancedCandlestickChart.workspaceSaveFailed: Save failed. Check browser local-storage permissions.
AdvancedCandlestickChart.workspaceLocalOnly: Stored only in this browser. It is not account sync and not a trading instruction.
AdvancedCandlestickChart.annotationPlaceholder: Record support/resistance levels, observations, or review notes.

IntradayPriceChart.degradedState: Intraday data is unavailable for this provider.

Watchlist.title: Watchlist
Watchlist.description: Track your favorite stocks and their latest performance.
Watchlist.name: Name
Watchlist.emptyHint: Add symbols to start tracking prices and alerts.
Watchlist.loadFailedDescription: Could not load your watchlist. Check the API service, then try again.

InstrumentDetail.intradayDescription: Minute price, average price, previous close, and volume when available.
InstrumentDetail.marketDepthDescription: Five-level bid/ask, recent trades, large-order tracking, and fund-flow summary when available.
InstrumentDetail.marketDepthUnavailable: Market depth data is unavailable for this provider.
InstrumentDetail.marketDepthNoOrderBook: No verified order book data available.
InstrumentDetail.aiReportDesc: Generated based on latest market data, news, and fundamentals.
InstrumentDetail.fundamentalsDesc: Key financial metrics and business summary.
InstrumentDetail.latestNewsDesc: Recent news articles and sentiment analysis.
InstrumentDetail.newsRecoveryRecovered: News was refreshed and stored locally.
InstrumentDetail.newsRecoveryNoData: No usable news was found from the available sources.
InstrumentDetail.newsRecoveryUnsupported: No executable news source is configured for this instrument.
InstrumentDetail.newsDiagnosticMissingCredentials: A configured news source needs an API key.
InstrumentDetail.newsDiagnosticPersistenceError: Usable news could not be stored locally.
InstrumentDetail.newsDiagnosticEmptyResponse: A news source returned no usable rows.
InstrumentDetail.newsDiagnosticNoPersistableCandidates: Search results did not meet the stored-news evidence rules.
InstrumentDetail.newsDiagnosticUnsupportedIdentity: The instrument identity is not supported by the available news sources.
InstrumentDetail.newsDiagnosticUnsupportedMarket: The configured sources do not support this market.
InstrumentDetail.newsDiagnosticDatabaseFallbackEmpty: No stored news was available after fallback.
InstrumentDetail.newsDiagnosticUnknown: A news source returned an unrecognized status.
InstrumentDetail.watchlistToggleFailed: Could not update the watchlist. Try again.
InstrumentDetail.dailyBarSummaryDesc: Latest daily-bar source, provider, freshness, and chart coverage.
InstrumentDetail.dailyMovementUnavailable: Need at least two daily bars to calculate movement.
InstrumentDetail.movementTextFirstHint: Direction is shown with signs and labels, not color alone.
InstrumentDetail.barsLoadFailedHint: Check provider settings or task-run diagnostics, then retry ingestion.
InstrumentDetail.noDailyBarsHint: Run single-symbol daily-bar ingestion or verify the active provider settings.
InstrumentDetail.recentOhlcvDesc: Latest daily rows backing the chart.
InstrumentDetail.chartEmpty: No daily-bar data available for chart.

AiResearchDesk.title: AI Research Desk
AiResearchDesk.description: Choose a small research basket, inspect technical signals and macro context, then ask AI for an evidence-grounded summary.
AiResearchDesk.researchBoundary: Research only: this desk summarizes evidence, technical signals, macro context, risks, data gaps, and follow-up questions. It does not provide trading instructions, target prices, position sizing, or execution workflows.
AiResearchDesk.metricSelectedDesc: Symbols in the current research basket.
AiResearchDesk.basketDesc: Keep up to {limit} symbols selected; the first slice analyzes one active symbol at a time.
AiResearchDesk.emptyBasket: Add a symbol from watchlist, signals, followed items, or manual entry.
AiResearchDesk.noFollowedCandidates: No followed market overview symbols are available.
AiResearchDesk.activeSymbolDesc: The AI assistant runs on the active symbol while the basket stays visible for quick switching.
AiResearchDesk.selectSymbolFirst: Select or enter a symbol to start AI research.
AiResearchDesk.assistantQuestion: Build a research-only summary for {symbol}. Explain why it is on my desk ({signal}), how stored macro evidence ({macro}) may matter, key risks, missing evidence, and follow-up research questions. Do not provide trading instructions.
AiResearchDesk.signalsDesc: Deterministic pattern signals are inputs for research, not instructions.
AiResearchDesk.noSignals: No deterministic signals are available for the current candidate set.
AiResearchDesk.marketDailyDesc: Provider-backed stock fund flow, limit-up, Dragon Tiger List, and block-trade context. These rows are not AI citations.
AiResearchDesk.marketDailyNoFundFlow: No stock fund-flow rows are available.
AiResearchDesk.marketDailyNoLimitUp: No limit-up reason rows are available.
AiResearchDesk.marketDailyNoDragonTiger: No Dragon Tiger List rows are available.
AiResearchDesk.marketDailyPoolOnly: Limit-up pool row; provider did not expose a reason field.
AiResearchDesk.marketDailyCitationBoundary: Live daily-data rows are research context only in this phase and are not stored local evidence or assistant citations.
AiResearchDesk.macroDesc: Buffett Indicator, rates, inflation, and liquidity context from stored local observations when available.
AiResearchDesk.macroObservationMissing: No citable local observation is stored.
AiResearchDesk.noMacro: No macro indicators are available from the market overview payload.
AiResearchDesk.sourceStatusDesc: FRED and World Bank readiness guide collection work; these rows are not AI citations.
AiResearchDesk.sourceStatusUnavailable: Official source readiness could not be loaded.
AiResearchDesk.gapsDesc: Gaps are shown as research limitations and are not AI citations.
AiResearchDesk.marketOverviewUnavailable: Market overview context could not be loaded.
AiResearchDesk.unknownGap: A source gap was reported without details.
AiResearchDesk.noGaps: No source gaps are reported in the loaded context.

StockDiscovery.title: Full A-share discovery
StockDiscovery.description: Screen the locally synchronized A-share universe with transparent deterministic profiles, then let AI explain the fixed shortlist without changing membership or ranking.
StockDiscovery.refreshFailed: Could not refresh the A-share universe.
StockDiscovery.refreshQueued: The universe refresh task was created. Follow its TaskRun for progress and diagnostics.
StockDiscovery.criteriaBoundary: Every active criterion must match. Missing evidence is reported as a gap and never inferred as a pass.
StockDiscovery.emptyShortlist: No candidate matched all selected criteria. Review evidence coverage and adjust visible parameters if appropriate.
StockDiscovery.noCitations: No citation IDs are available for this result.

AshareEvidenceCoverage.sourceMixEmpty: No source-attributed daily bars are stored yet.
AshareEvidenceCoverage.title: A-share evidence coverage
AshareEvidenceCoverage.description: Monitor stored daily bars, technical indicators, and fundamentals used by full-universe stock discovery and AI analysis.
AshareEvidenceCoverage.safety: Research evidence only. Provider failures stay visible; this workflow never places trades.
AshareEvidenceCoverage.unavailable: Evidence coverage could not be loaded.
AshareEvidenceCoverage.unavailableHint: The AI Research desk remains available. Retry the authoritative coverage request when the backend is reachable.
AshareEvidenceCoverage.confirmBaseline: Start a full A-share evidence baseline? This may make many provider requests and can take a long time.
AshareEvidenceCoverage.confirmCancel: Request cancellation of the active evidence backfill? Completed batches will be preserved.
AshareEvidenceCoverage.actionresume: A resumable evidence backfill was created.
AshareEvidenceCoverage.actionretry_failed: A retry run for failed symbols was created.
AshareEvidenceCoverage.noRuns: No evidence backfill has been recorded yet.

MarketAssistant.title: AI Market Assistant
MarketAssistant.description: Ask questions against verified daily bars, indicators, fundamentals, and news context with explicit data gaps.
MarketAssistant.defaultQuestion: Summarize {symbol}'s recent trend, key risks, and missing data.
MarketAssistant.questionPlaceholder: Example: Explain the recent trend and risks without giving trading advice.
MarketAssistant.quickPrompttrend: Summarize {symbol}'s recent trend and name the data sources used.
MarketAssistant.quickPromptrisk: List the current risks to watch for {symbol} without giving buy or sell advice.
MarketAssistant.quickPromptdata: Explain which key data is still missing for a stronger {symbol} analysis.
MarketAssistant.emptyState: Ask a question to receive traceable analysis, citations, diagnostics, and a safety note.
MarketAssistant.diagnosticResearchSnapshotInvalidId: The requested daily shortlist snapshot ID is invalid.
MarketAssistant.diagnosticResearchSnapshotSessionUnavail: The daily shortlist snapshot cannot be loaded because the database is unavailable.
MarketAssistant.diagnosticResearchSnapshotUnavailable: The requested daily shortlist snapshot is temporarily unavailable.
MarketAssistant.diagnosticResearchSnapshotNotFound: The requested committed daily shortlist snapshot was not found.
MarketAssistant.diagnosticResearchSnapshotSymbolMismatch: The daily shortlist snapshot does not contain this instrument.
MarketAssistant.diagnosticMixedDailyBarProvenance: Daily bars span multiple source or adjustment cohorts; only the latest continuous trusted cohort is used.
MarketAssistant.diagnosticUnknownDailyBarProvenance: Stored daily bars do not have complete source or adjustment provenance.
MarketAssistant.diagnosticSourceUnavailable: A required data source is temporarily unavailable.
MarketAssistant.diagnosticSourceNoData: This source has no verified data available.

InstrumentKline.title: K-line Workspace
InstrumentKline.description: Browse stored stock, ETF, and index daily K-lines in one compact research workspace.
InstrumentKline.loadFailedDescription: Check that the API and database are available, then refresh this page.
InstrumentKline.catalogDescription: {count} active stock, ETF, or index instruments match the current filters.
InstrumentKline.emptyCatalogDescription: Run an explicit ingestion task before using this database-only workspace.
InstrumentKline.noMatchesDescription: Try another symbol, name, or asset type.
InstrumentKline.catalogUncollectedDescription: The database has not collected any {assetType} identities yet. This is a storage coverage gap, not a search failure.
InstrumentKline.catalogUncollectedNext: Review Data Storage or Crawler Monitor before searching for {assetType} K-lines again.
InstrumentKline.chooseDescription: Select a stock, ETF, or index from the stored catalog to inspect its daily K-line.
InstrumentKline.notFoundDescription: The exact symbol and market identity is not available in the stored catalog.
InstrumentKline.noDataDescription: This instrument exists, but no coherent stored daily-bar series is available.

Instruments.title: Instruments
Instruments.description: Browse instruments and inspect latest daily-bar availability, source, provider, and freshness.
Instruments.tableDescription: Showing latest daily-bar state for {visible} of {total} instruments.
Instruments.healthSummaryDesc: Latest daily-bar health for {visible} of {total} instruments using {provider}.
Instruments.name: Name
Instruments.emptyHint: Configure provider settings or run single-symbol daily-bar ingestion to populate this page.
Instruments.noMatchesHint: Try another symbol or name, or clear the current filters.
Instruments.loadFailedHint: Check that the API is running, then refresh this page.
Instruments.storedDescription: Browse the database-only stock, ETF, and index catalog with latest stored daily-bar coverage.
Instruments.storedEmptyHint: Run an explicit daily-bar ingestion task to populate this database-only catalog.
Instruments.comparisonDescription: Compare 2-4 instruments with normalized price paths, interval returns, volatility, and correlation.
Instruments.comparisonInsufficientDescription: At least 2 instruments with daily-bar history are required.
Instruments.comparisonInsufficientBody: No comparable instrument set is available yet.
Instruments.comparisonSelectAtLeastTwo: Select at least 2 instruments to compare.

StockComparison.title: Stock Comparison
StockComparison.description: Compare two to four A-share stocks over one exact shared window of stored daily bars.
StockComparison.selectionDescription: Search stored active A-share stocks and keep two to four symbols in the URL.
StockComparison.searchPlaceholder: Search stored A-share code or name
StockComparison.emptySelectionHint: Search and add at least two stored A-share stocks.
StockComparison.selectedNoData: No coherent stored daily-bar series is available for this period.
StockComparison.noSearchResults: No stored active A-share stock matches this search.
StockComparison.loadFailedDescription: The read-only comparison API could not be loaded. No external data source was contacted.
StockComparison.emptyDescription: Search the stored A-share catalog and add two to four stocks.
StockComparison.insufficientDescription: At least two stored A-share stocks are required for a shared comparison.
StockComparison.insufficientBody: No comparable stock set is available yet.
StockComparison.noDataDescription: The selected stocks do not yet have at least two exact shared dates in one coherent series.
StockComparison.analysisDescription: All paths, returns, volatility, and correlations use the same exact dates and first shared baseline.
StockComparison.selectAtLeastTwo: Select at least two stocks to compare.
StockComparison.name: Name

TaskRuns.title: Task Runs
TaskRuns.description: Monitor background tasks and data ingestion processes.
TaskRuns.emptyHint: No matching background tasks yet. Run ingestion or analysis to create task records.
TaskRuns.loadFailedHint: Check that the API is running, then refresh this page.
TaskRuns.qualityDiagnosticsDesc: Data-quality checks persisted with this task result.
TaskRuns.qualityDiagnosticsMissing: No quality diagnostics were persisted for this task run.
TaskRuns.qualitySummaryWarn: Quality checks completed with warnings. The task may still have succeeded.
TaskRuns.qualitySummaryFail: Quality checks found blocking data issues. This is separate from the task execution status.
TaskRuns.qualitySummaryUnknown: Quality diagnostics were present, but the status was not recognized.

Portfolios.title: Portfolios
Portfolios.description: Manage your simulated portfolios and track performance.
Portfolios.emptyHint: Add positions or switch to another portfolio.

ReportsCenter.title: Reports Center
ReportsCenter.description: Browse and search historical AI-generated stock reports.
ReportsCenter.emptyHint: Try changing filters or generating a new daily report.

Alerts.title: Alerts
Alerts.description: Recent watchlist alert triggers and rule history.
Alerts.triggerHistoryDesc: Alerts fired when price or RSI rules were met.
Alerts.emptyHint: Configure alert rules on the watchlist to start tracking triggers.
Alerts.loadFailed: Could not load alerts. Check that the API is running.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.dataProviderDesc: Used by ingestion and analysis. Saved to data/platform_settings.json on the server.
Settings.mockReadiness: Mock uses deterministic fixture data for development and tests.
Settings.yfinanceReadiness: YFinance can fetch historical daily bars; live quote semantics are not enabled.
Settings.akshareReadiness: AkShare requires CN-market dependencies and the AkShare option enabled.
Settings.tushareReadiness: Tushare requires a saved Tushare token before it can fetch data.
Settings.llmDesc: Configure the API used by AI analysis and reports.
Settings.llmPresetHint: Presets supply the endpoint and model. Use Custom for another OpenAI-compatible API.
Settings.llmApiBaseHint: Used only by the Custom preset. Use an HTTP(S) endpoint without embedded credentials, query parameters, or fragments.
Settings.llmModelHint: Used only by the Custom preset.
Settings.llmApiKeyConfigured: A key is saved on the server. Leave blank to keep it, or enter the new provider's key when switching services.
Settings.llmApiKeyRequired: Enter an API key when enabling DeepSeek, OpenAI, or a custom endpoint.
Settings.llmErrorInvalidBase: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS API Base URL without embedded credentials, query parameters, or fragments.
Settings.llmErrorMissingModel: Enter a model name for the Custom preset.
Settings.llmErrorMissingKey: Enter an API key before enabling an external model API.
Settings.llmTestHint: Tests the saved model configuration once. Save changes before testing.
Settings.llmTestProviderDisabled: Enable and save a model API before testing.
Settings.llmTestKeyNotConfigured: Save an API key before testing the connection.
Settings.llmTestInvalidConfiguration: The saved model configuration is invalid. Review and save it again.
Settings.llmTestProviderUnavailable: The model provider could not be reached.
Settings.llmTestInvalidResponse: The model provider returned an invalid response.
Settings.llmTestRequestFailed: The connection test could not be completed.
Settings.advancedSettingsSummary: Data providers, display preferences, and maintenance
Settings.maintenanceLinksDesc: Open diagnostic surfaces only when stored evidence or background tasks need attention.
Settings.aboutLine1: Use Dashboard buttons to ingest market data and refresh analysis.
Settings.aboutLine2: Background tasks require Redis and a Celery worker when async mode is enabled.
Settings.akshareDesc: Free Chinese market data via AkShare library. Install with pip install akshare.
Settings.akshareHint: When enabled, AkShare will be used for CN-market instruments when selected as the provider.
Settings.eastmoneyAccessDesc: Optional fallback access when direct public endpoints are blocked.
Settings.eastmoneyAccessHint: Direct access is tried first. Secrets are never displayed in public settings or diagnostics.
Settings.tushareDesc: Chinese market data via Tushare Pro. Requires registration at tushare.pro.
Settings.tushareTokenConfigured: Token already saved — leave blank to keep unchanged
Settings.tushareHint: Get your free token from https://tushare.pro. Paid tiers unlock more data. HTTP URL is optional for custom Tushare servers.
Settings.newsSourcesDesc: Configure financial news and search adapters. Search results are collection candidates until stored locally as news.
Settings.newsSourcesOrderHint: One provider id per line. Unknown values are ignored; missing registry providers are appended after save.
Settings.newsProviderKeyConfigured: Key already saved — leave blank to keep unchanged
Settings.newsSourcesQuotaHint: Automated tests use mocked providers only. Manual live searches may consume provider quota.
Settings.newsSourcesCitationBoundary: Only stored local NewsArticle rows are citable evidence.
Settings.newsProviderReadinessAnspire: Bearer-auth adapter for A-share, US, HK, and public-opinion discovery.
Settings.newsProviderReadinessSerpApi: Baidu search adapter for Chinese financial news and social/media results.
Settings.newsProviderReadinessTavily: Registered for follow-up general web/news search; adapter is deferred.
Settings.newsProviderReadinessBocha: Chinese search candidate; endpoint and storage contract still need review.
Settings.newsProviderReadinessBrave: US/global privacy-oriented search candidate; storage rights need plan review.
Settings.newsProviderReadinessMiniMax: Structured search candidate; backend REST contract is not confirmed yet.
Settings.newsProviderReadinessYfinance: Existing yfinance news ingestion path; live-search adapter is not part of this slice.
Settings.newsProviderReadinessAkshare: Existing AkShare CN news ingestion path when AkShare is enabled.
Settings.newsProviderReadinessTushare: Existing Tushare placeholder; requires a saved Tushare token.
Settings.newsProviderReadinessMock: Deterministic local fixture path for development and tests.
Settings.homeIndexPreferencesDesc: Choose the ordered benchmark indices shown in the homepage ticker and core index cards.
Settings.homeIndexCodesHint: Enter one code per line, or separate codes with commas. Empty and duplicate entries are ignored.
Settings.homeIndexFieldsHint: These options control only the core index cards; the ticker stays compact for scanning.
Settings.macroFavoritesDesc: Choose the ordered macro and valuation indicators shown in the homepage macro watchlist.
Settings.macroFavoritesHint: Enter one code per line, or separate codes with commas. Empty and duplicate entries are ignored.
Settings.macroFavoritesDefault: Default: buffett_indicator_us, buffett_indicator_cn, buffett_indicator_hk, us_10y_yield, us_10y_2y_spread, us_cpi_yoy, us_m2_yoy, cn_m2_yoy

DailyResearchShortlist.title: Daily A-share research shortlist
DailyResearchShortlist.description: A frozen, deterministic shortlist from locally stored A-share evidence. Compare why each candidate qualified, what argues against it, and what would invalidate the research case.
DailyResearchShortlist.readinessNoDailyBars: No stored daily bars are available for the active A-share universe.
DailyResearchShortlist.readinessCoverageNotReady: Evidence coverage has not reached the publication thresholds.
DailyResearchShortlist.readinessNoAlignedCandidates: Eligible candidates do not have decision-date-aligned evidence.
DailyResearchShortlist.readinessEntryBarChanged: A candidate entry observation changed before publication. Retry after local data stabilizes.
DailyResearchShortlist.invalidRequest: The shortlist request is invalid. Review the visible profile and criteria.
DailyResearchShortlist.noSupportingFactors: No strong supporting factor was recorded.
DailyResearchShortlist.noOpposingFactors: No weak rule buffer was recorded.
DailyResearchShortlist.noDataGaps: No candidate-level data gap was recorded.
DailyResearchShortlist.gapTechnicalBeforeDecisionDate: Technical indicators are dated {asOf}, before the decision date {decisionDate}.
DailyResearchShortlist.gapFundamentalsUnavailable: A fundamentals snapshot was not evaluated for this candidate.
DailyResearchShortlist.gapFundamentalsBeforeDecisionDate: Fundamentals are dated {asOf}, before the decision date {decisionDate}.
DailyResearchShortlist.gapNewsNotEvaluatedByProfile: News and sentiment were not active eligibility rules for this profile.
DailyResearchShortlist.gapUnknown: An unrecognized evidence gap was reported ({code}).
DailyResearchShortlist.invalidationTemplate: {rule} is invalidated when the observed value is {operator} {threshold}.
DailyResearchShortlist.invalidationUnknown: An unrecognized invalidation condition was reported ({code}).
DailyResearchShortlist.noExplanation: No explanation was stored for this snapshot.
DailyResearchShortlist.explanationLocaleMismatch: This immutable cohort's explanation was first published in {language}. Structured factors, gaps, and invalidation conditions remain available in the current language.
DailyResearchShortlist.explanationLocaleUnavailable: The original explanation language is unavailable. Structured factors, gaps, and invalidation conditions remain available.
DailyResearchShortlist.diagnosticStaleEntryBar: Candidates excluded for stale entry bars: {count}.
DailyResearchShortlist.diagnosticUnknown: An unrecognized publication diagnostic was reported ({code}).
DailyResearchShortlist.loadFailed: Latest shortlist could not be loaded
DailyResearchShortlist.loadFailedDescription: The AI Research Desk below remains available. Retry publication when the shortlist service is reachable.
DailyResearchShortlist.emptyDescription: Generate the current A-share research cohort after local evidence meets the readiness thresholds.
DailyResearchShortlist.emptyRunTitle: The published run contains no candidates
DailyResearchShortlist.emptyRunDescription: Review its diagnostics and evidence coverage before generating another snapshot.
DailyResearchShortlist.safetyBoundary: Research support only. The shortlist does not provide buy, sell, hold, target-price, position-sizing, order, broker, or automated-trading instructions.

ResearchShortlistOutcomes.title: Published cohort outcomes
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.description: Review frozen 5, 20, and 60-session observations for each published A-share research cohort.
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.refreshingCohort: A new shortlist was published. Refreshing its outcomes...
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.updateFailedDescription: The saved shortlist and AI Research Desk remain available.
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.historyEmpty: No earlier cohort outcomes are available.
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.diagnosticIncompleteForwardBar: An incomplete forward bar was ignored
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.diagnosticForwardAdjustmentMismatch: Forward adjustment does not match entry
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.diagnosticInstrumentInactive: Instrument is inactive but remains in the cohort
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.diagnosticQfqProxyBasis: Forward-adjusted prices use the documented proxy basis
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.diagnosticAdjustmentCorrected: Legacy Tushare adjustment metadata was normalized
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.loadFailed: Cohort outcomes could not be loaded
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.loadFailedDescription: The published shortlist and AI Research Desk remain available while outcome tracking is unavailable.
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.emptyDescription: Outcome tracking begins when a daily research shortlist has been published.
ResearchShortlistOutcomes.safetyBoundary: Research support only. This outcome panel does not provide buy, sell, hold, target-price, position-sizing, order, broker, or automated-trading instructions.

IndustryRankingHistory.title: Industry gain ranking history
IndustryRankingHistory.description: Stored Eastmoney industry rankings for the latest 12 trading days.
IndustryRankingHistory.empty: No stored industry ranking history yet. Refresh to collect it.
IndustryRankingHistory.failed: Refresh failed. Existing stored history was preserved.
IndustryRankingHistory.loadFailedTitle: Industry rankings could not be loaded
IndustryRankingHistory.loadFailedDescription: Other stored market research remains available.

System.backendOffline: Cannot reach the API. Start it with: uvicorn apps.api.main:app --reload --port 8000 (or set API_BASE_URL in apps/web/.env.local)
System.backendOutdated: The API is outdated (missing watchlist/portfolios endpoints). Restart from the latest code.
